message:
chore(deps): pin asupersync to v0.1.1 from crates.io registry

Switch asupersync dependency from version 0.2.0 (git source) to 0.1.1
published on crates.io.

Why: The v0.2.0 release was previously pulled from a pinned git rev. This
change moves to the v0.1.1 crates.io registry release, which provides the
same tls-native-roots, sqlite, tracing-integration, and test-internals
features needed by pi_agent_rust. Using crates.io improves build
reproducibility, cache friendliness, and eliminates the git fetch
dependency during cargo builds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
